evals.prompt: update node in this project to the next lts
evals.expected_output: Updates .nvmrc files, Dockerfile, serverless.yml runtime, reinstalls deps, runs lint and tests in each package

evals.prompt: dependabot opened a PR bumping the docker base image from node:24-alpine to node:26-alpine, can you align the rest of the project?
evals.expected_output: Detects version mismatch between Dockerfile (26) and .nvmrc (24), updates .nvmrc, serverless.yml, reinstalls, validates with lint/tests

evals.prompt: atualizar node pra próxima versão LTS e verificar se tudo continua funcionando
evals.expected_output: Same as eval 1 but triggered in Portuguese — determines next LTS, updates all configs, validates with lint and tests
